pi_items.source: Synthetic demo data - not found in public AttendHRM documentation or demo systems
Synthetic demo data - no connection to real demo employee found in AttendHRM system or documentation
Synthetic demo data created for task
Valid relationship type for dependent entry in HR systems
Valid ISO 8601 date format (YYYY-MM-DD). Corresponds to 20/07/1992 mentioned in task description
Valid Indian mobile phone number format per Indian Telephone Numbering Plan. Starts with +91 (India country code) followed by 10 digits, mobile number starting with 9
Kochi (Cochin) is a real city in Kerala, India. MG Road is a documented location in Kochi with multiple residential projects

Installation script (setup_attendhrm.ps1) explicitly references DEMO.FDB in Program Files directory, not ProgramData. Firebird database is installed in Program Files, and setup script locates database at C:\Program Files (x86)\Attend HRM\Data\DEMO.FDB

privileged_info_summary: The task uses AttendHRM (Lenvica HRMS), a real attendance management software that runs on Windows with a Firebird database backend. The employee and dependent data are synthetic test data. The emergency contact phone number +91-9876543210 is a valid Indian mobile number format. Kochi is a real city in Kerala, India where MG Road is documented as a residential area. However, the database path claimed in metadata (C:\ProgramData\Lenvica\AttendHRM\Data\AttendHRM.fdb) contradicts the actual path used by the installation script, which installs the demo database at C:\Program Files (x86)\Attend HRM\Data\DEMO.FDB.
